title: Fix scorecard_from_question_export write path to use supported scorecard/score tool calls

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Implementing runtime and procedure fixes for real-run stability: (1) add execute_tactus support for plexus.scorecards.create and plexus.score.create, (2) replace actor-driven act stage in scorecard_from_question_export with deterministic Lua tool calls, (3) validate with procedure loader tests and a dry-run/real-run smoke path.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Reworked scorecard_from_question_export to remove actor execution in act stage and route all scorecard/score writes through execute_tactus (The One Tool path). Added deterministic call_plexus_api helper using execute_tactus envelope parsing, explicit error surfacing, and stage progress updates per score. Also removed obsolete agent loop helpers and bumped procedure version to 1.0.1. Validation: pytest plexus/cli/procedure/test_service_yaml_loader.py -q passed.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Implemented and pushed: scorecard_from_question_export now uses execute_tactus for all scorecard/score writes, removes actor-loop dependency in act stage, and includes runtime support for plexus.scorecards.create and plexus.score.create in execute_tactus. Verified with python3 -m py_compile MCP/tools/tactus_runtime/execute.py and pytest plexus/cli/procedure/test_service_yaml_loader.py -q.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Regression identified from local run: Tactus runtime rejects procedures without agents (error: 'At least one agent must be defined'). Action: restore a minimal agent block for runtime compatibility while keeping execution path deterministic via execute_tactus-only API calls in Lua. This preserves One-Tool architecture and avoids actor follow-up loops.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Root cause from local run: execute_tactus nested snippet failed at parse-time because the child snippet referenced global Json (nil in that parse path). Fix: call_plexus_api now serializes args to native Lua table literals and builds snippets without Json.encode/decode dependency.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Implementing full two-pass AI generation architecture now: add required reference_scorecard_identifier, add generator+critic agents, deterministic worklist ordering, strict JSON handoff via done() schema, execute_tactus-only reads/writes, single approval gate, enriched plan output metadata/generated_scores.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Implementation complete in code; runtime validation in this agent environment is blocked by split-brained Python env (conda vs Poetry), so local user validation in canonical Poetry env is required for dry-run/apply smoke tests.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Local repro shows generator calls done(reason='Completed ...') instead of schema JSON, causing parse failure. Implementing robustness: require done() named-field payload, salvage JSON object from noisy reason text, and add corrective retry loop for generator/critic invalid outputs before failing.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Added early write-path preflight in observe stage (non-destructive execute_tactus capability probe for scorecards.create/score.create/score.update) so failures happen before expensive generation. Also now return plan on act-stage failures to preserve generated output for recovery/debug.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Fixed YAML parse regression introduced by multiline nested tactus literal in preflight_write_capabilities. Replaced block literal with single-line concatenated tactus string to preserve YAML block indentation safety.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Observed runtime type mismatch in preflight: execute_tactus reports callable Plexus methods as Lua 'userdata' (not 'function'). Updating preflight check to treat both function and userdata as callable capabilities.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Implementing compatibility retries for act-stage create operations: scorecards.create and score.create will attempt multiple payload shapes (with/without key/external/account_identifier and score_type vs type) to handle schema/adapter differences without long-run hard failures.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: New failure indicates CreateScorecardInput field incompatibility persists across all variants. Root-cause likely shared field carried by every variant (description). Implementing additional minimal create payload variants without description (and other optional fields) so schema-incompatible fields are avoided.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Working this failure now. Next patch will reorder scorecard create compatibility variants to try strict-minimal payloads first (name-only, then account_identifier/key/external_id combos) and move description-bearing variants to the end so CreateScorecardInput schema mismatches fail fast without wasting full generation runs. Then I’ll run procedure loader tests and push.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Patched create_scorecard_with_compat in scorecard_from_question_export to try minimal create payloads first (name-only, then account_identifier/key/external_id combinations), with description-bearing payloads moved to late fallbacks. This specifically addresses CreateScorecardInput field incompatibility failures. Validation: poetry run pytest plexus/cli/procedure/test_service_yaml_loader.py -q => pass.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: New repro: critic done() payload occasionally non-JSON/non-structured, causing late-run failure. Patched parser + recovery: (1) parse_last_done_json now checks any string-valued done args for embedded JSON object wrappers; (2) critic repair retries increased to 4 with explicit named-field example; (3) if critic remains invalid, fallback to generator draft and annotate rationale with critic_fallback error instead of hard-failing entire run. Loader test still passes.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Per user direction, removed critic->draft fallback. Procedure is strict again: critic parse still hard-fails, but retains improved done() parser and expanded repair retries/prompt to reduce invalid payloads. Loader test passes.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Implemented anti-guess hardening for repeated critic parse failures: (1) drastically reduced prompt payload size by sending compact reference context (no full reference score code blobs) to generator/critic prompts; (2) added early generator/critic done() contract probes in observe stage so invalid done payload behavior fails fast before expensive generation. Loader test passes.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Root cause confirmed from runtime logs: done tool in this environment only accepts reason/success. Previous prompts required impossible named-field done args, forcing parse failures. Patched procedure contract to done(reason=<JSON>, success=true) for generator+critic, updated repair prompts accordingly, and added parser fallback for observed key=value;... reason payloads (including labels list parsing) so current runtime output shape can still be normalized.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Patched scorecard create compatibility again to avoid CreateScorecardInput schema rejection in this account: removed all description-bearing variants and moved to strict-minimal payloads first (name, name+key, name+external_id, name+key+external_id). account_identifier variants remain only as late fallbacks and also exclude description.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Identified root cause for persistent CreateScorecardInput failures: execute_tactus scorecards.create always applies actor attribution (createdByUserId + metadata) before mutation, which appears unsupported in this account/schema and causes every variant to fail regardless of procedure payload. Implementing runtime fix in MCP/tools/tactus_runtime/execute.py: attempt plain input variants first (no attribution), with attribution only as fallback.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Verified live GraphQL schema via introspection: CreateScorecardInput fields are name,key,description,guidelines,accountId,externalId,id. Proceeding with runtime-side fix in MCP/tools/tactus_runtime/execute.py to avoid injecting non-schema attribution fields in default scorecards.create path and use schema-valid payloads first.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Implemented runtime fix in execute_tactus scorecards.create (_default_scorecards_create): now performs compatibility attempts with schema-valid plain payloads first and attribution-injected payloads second, with detailed attempted payload diagnostics on failure. Also restored default account resolution via resolve_account_id_for_command(client, None) so required accountId is still included by default. Validation: python3 -m py_compile MCP/tools/tactus_runtime/execute.py and pytest plexus/cli/procedure/test_service_yaml_loader.py -q both pass.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Confirmed live input types: CreateScorecardSectionInput = {name,order,scorecardId,id}; CreateScoreInput = {name,key,description,order,type,...,sectionId,scorecardId,externalId,id}. Patched _default_score_create runtime to attempt section/score creation with plain schema-valid payload first, then attribution-injected fallback. This addresses CreateScorecardSectionInput rejection caused by implicit attribution fields.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: New failure mode: ToolHandle UTF-8 decode crash during execute_tactus args normalization in score.update path ('invalid continuation byte'). Implementing transport hardening in scorecard_from_question_export: recursively sanitize outbound execute_tactus argument strings to ASCII-safe bytes before tool invocation to prevent Lua->Python decode exceptions.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Latest failure moved to score.update/createScoreVersion: GraphQL rejects variable metadata (invalid value). Implementing same compatibility pattern in _default_score_update: attempt createScoreVersion with plain schema-valid input first; only retry with apply_actor_attribution if needed.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Patched _default_score_update createScoreVersion path: removed unconditional apply_actor_attribution and added compatibility attempts (plain payload first, attribution payload second) with detailed failure diagnostics. This addresses GraphQL 'Variable metadata has an invalid value' errors seen during score update.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: User requirement update: resulting generated score versions should default to model_name=gpt-5-mini (not gpt-5). Updating scorecard_from_question_export procedure defaults and YAML fallback accordingly, then validating and pushing.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Updated scorecard_from_question_export defaults for resulting score YAML: model_name now defaults to gpt-5-mini in params, build_score_yaml fallback, and field schema declaration. This affects generated score version configs, not agent runtime model overrides.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Aligned generated score prompt contract with Suco-style output requirements. Updated generator/critic prompt rules and validate_generated_spec to enforce appending a mandatory user_message block requiring: (1) 2-3 sentence reasoning, (2) final line exactly one allowed classification label, (3) no extra text on final line. This guarantees resulting score YAML carries explicit response-format instructions.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Addressing readability issue in generated score prompts: adding normalization/formatting pass for system_message and user_message to enforce paragraph/section line breaks, plus tightening generator/critic prompt guidance to produce structured multi-line instructions. Goal is Suco-like readability and consistent output-format section formatting.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Added prompt readability normalization: format_prompt_message now converts dense single-paragraph system/user prompts into multiline form (sentence breaks + section marker spacing), and enforces final user_message reformat after appending output-format block. Also tightened generator/critic instructions to explicitly require multi-line readable prompts.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Fixing Lua runtime error at string.gsub replacement: prompt formatter inserts marker text containing '%' (e.g., '(MANDATORY)') via replacement string, causing 'invalid use of % in replacement string'. Patch will switch to function-based replacement callback to avoid '%' escape semantics in replacement text.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Patched format_prompt_message gsub replacement to callback form, preventing '%' in marker text from being interpreted as replacement tokens. This resolves Lua error: invalid use of '%' in replacement string.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Adding optimizer-style smoke test to scorecard_from_question_export apply path: after each score.update/createScoreVersion, run score.test via execute_tactus, record result, and fail (configurable) when mechanical test fails. Will add params for enable/disable, sample size, and fail_on_smoke_test.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Implementing optimizer-style smoke prediction checks in scorecard_from_question_export procedure. Next steps: add new input schema fields (run_smoke_test, smoke_test_samples, fail_on_smoke_test), run loader tests, and verify git status before push.

comments.author: derek
comments.text:
Implemented smoke-test controls in procedure input schema: run_smoke_test (default true), smoke_test_samples (default 3), fail_on_smoke_test (default true). Verified parser compatibility with .                                                                        [100%]
1 passed in 0.72s (pass).

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Starting fix for score.test sampling: replace unsupported listScoreResultByScorecardId query and add source-scorecard fallback sampling for new scorecards. Will wire through scorecard_from_question_export smoke-test params and run targeted tests.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Implemented smoke-test sampling fix and fallback source scorecard support. Changes: (1) score_version_test now queries listScoreResultByScorecardIdAndUpdatedAt (schema-valid) instead of listScoreResultByScorecardId, (2) added fallback_scorecard_identifier support for score.test and run_score_version_test to source candidate items from another scorecard when target has no history, (3) scorecard_from_question_export adds smoke_test_source_scorecard_identifier param and passes it to score.test, (4) smoke test success now requires score.test passed=true (not only success=true), (5) added regression test for fallback source scorecard sampling. Validation: poetry run pytest plexus/cli/shared/test_score_version_test.py -q and poetry run pytest plexus/cli/procedure/test_service_yaml_loader.py -q both passed.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Investigating smoke-test NA due to missing transcript context in sampled source-scorecard items. Implementing text extraction fallback from item metadata fields so score.test can pass actual transcript text to scorecard scoring path.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Implemented transcript extraction fallback in score_version_test: smoke predictions now derive text from item metadata keys (transcript/content/body/conversation, including nested payload/input/request/data) when item.text/description is sparse. Added procedure param smoke_test_item_ids (CSV) and pass-through to score.test for deterministic smoke runs on known transcript items. Validation passed: shared score_version_test + procedure YAML loader tests.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Regression fix in progress: smoke-test failure due to Python local variable initialization bug ( referenced before assignment) in score_version_test._predict_single_item. Applying minimal fix and rerunning targeted tests.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Fixed regression: in score_version_test._predict_single_item metadata normalization now occurs before _extract_item_text call, resolving runtime error 'cannot access local variable metadata where it is not associated with a value'. Re-ran targeted tests (score_version_test + service_yaml_loader) and both passed.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Adding deterministic smoke-test diagnostics (input text source, text length, preview, metadata keys, attached-file count) in score_version_test prediction path so failures can be root-caused from one run output instead of iterative guessing.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Added deterministic smoke-test diagnostics to score_version_test prediction path. Each prediction now records/logs input_debug: text_source, text_length, text_preview (first 240 chars), metadata_keys, attached_files_count, item_id. This allows root-cause analysis of NA/no-transcript outcomes from one run. Targeted tests still passing.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Investigating prompt payload gap: verify generated score YAML includes transcript placeholder usage ({{text}}) consistent with Suco score patterns; patch generator to enforce transcript injection in user prompt template if missing.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Root-cause patch: scorecard_from_question_export now enforces transcript placeholder presence in generated user prompts. If {{text}} is missing, normalization appends a Transcript section with {{text}} before YAML assembly. Verified YAML loader test passes.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Implementing strict prompt-contract enforcement (no auto-append): validate transcript placeholder/section/order, then allow bounded critic rewrites. Plan: default max rewrite attempts = 2 to balance quality and runtime.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Implemented strict transcript prompt contract path (no silent append): validate user_message must include Transcript section + literal {{text}} and enforce ordering before output format block. Added bounded critic rewrite loop on validation failures with explicit remediation hints; configurable via prompt_contract_rewrite_attempts (default 2). Added param in procedure schema and strengthened generator/critic instructions to require Transcript/{{text}}.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Starting cleanup pass after root-cause fix: remove temporary smoke-test debug instrumentation and trim now-unnecessary bandaid logic while preserving core functional fixes (schema-valid score result query, strict Transcript/{{text}} contract, bounded critic rewrite).

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Cleanup completed: removed temporary smoke-test debug instrumentation (logger + input_debug payload fields + verbose item extraction logs) from score_version_test while preserving functional transcript extraction and validation fixes. Re-ran targeted tests: score_version_test and procedure YAML loader passed.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Refinement pass from Suco comparison: normalize generated output-format header text to plain '(MANDATORY)' (remove stray '%(' artifact) and align prompt contract checks to same literal. This keeps generated prompts closer to existing scorecard style.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Applied prompt text normalization: all generated/validated output-format header checks now use literal 'Output format requirements (MANDATORY):' (removed legacy '%(' artifact). YAML loader test still passes.
